trigger.description: Fires when a parking permit company contact is tagged for referral outreach

steps.description: Mark contact as in active parking permit referral sequence

steps.subject: Enforcement partner for your parking permit clients
steps.body:
Hi {{contact.first_name}},

I'm Elliott with Axle Towing. We provide parking enforcement across the Phoenix metro, and I'm reaching out because {{contact.company_name}} and Axle Towing are a natural fit.

Parking permits only work when there's enforcement behind them. When your clients issue permits but nobody is towing unauthorized vehicles, the permits lose their teeth and your clients get frustrated.

We'd like to be your enforcement partner. For any property you manage permits for, we can handle the towing side -- with preferred pricing for your referrals. Your clients get a complete parking solution, and you get to offer enforcement as part of your service without adding headcount.

Would you be open to discussing a partnership?

Elliott
Axle Towing
480-288-5526 | info@axletowing.com
axletowing.com
steps.description: Day 0 - Introduce enforcement partnership for permit companies

steps.subject: Re: Enforcement partner for your parking permit clients
steps.body:
Hi {{contact.first_name}},

Following up on the enforcement partnership idea. Here's what we bring to the table for {{contact.company_name}}'s clients:

- 24/7 enforcement availability, including weekends and holidays
- 30-minute average response time across the Phoenix metro
- Full AZ compliance -- proper signage, documentation, and legal process
- Monthly enforcement reports for property managers
- Zero cost to the property -- towing fees are collected from violators
- Dedicated account manager for your referred properties

We've seen this work well with other permit companies. You handle the permits and access control, we handle the enforcement. Property managers get a complete solution from two trusted partners.

Worth a 15-minute call to explore?

Elliott
Axle Towing
480-288-5526 | info@axletowing.com
axletowing.com
steps.description: Day 4 - Detail what Axle brings as enforcement partner

steps.subject: Open door for parking enforcement referrals
steps.body:
Hi {{contact.first_name}},

Last note from me on this. If {{contact.company_name}} ever has a client that needs enforcement behind their parking permits, we'd love the referral.

We serve the entire Phoenix metro -- {{contact.city}} and beyond -- and can typically start enforcement within a week of signing.

No need to reply now. Just keep us in mind when the need comes up.

Elliott
Axle Towing
480-288-5526 | info@axletowing.com
axletowing.com

steps.description: Mark parking permit referral sequence completed
